language_description: Select your interface language. Changes will be applied immediately.
models_description: You can turn on/off the AI models you want to use. At least one model must be active.
google_models_managed_separately: Google models are managed from the Google Session section.
sites_description: Add regular websites here. These sites will not have selector saving, they will only open as web views.
prompts_description: Select a prompt to automatically prepend to your messages or images.
storage_description: View and manage cache storage for AI model partitions.
ai_lifecycle_description: Configure how many AI sites stay active and when they go to sleep.
max_alive_tabs_description: Number of AI tabs kept warm in background (1 = only active tab).
sleep_timeout_description: How long before an inactive tab is put to sleep.
never_sleep_sites_description: Select sites that should never be put to sleep.
bottom_bar_description: Configure which tools and AI models appear in the hub.
tools_visibility_desc: Choose which tools are shown in the hub.
model_visibility_desc: Choose which AI models are shown in the hub.
text_input_mode_description: Choose how text is inserted into website input fields.
text_input_mode_auto_desc: Uses paste when possible and falls back to typing if needed.
text_input_mode_typing_desc: Types text into fields instead of pasting.
typing_speed_description: How fast characters are typed in Human Typing mode.
settings_header_description: Manage your Quizlab Reader workspace, models, prompts and automation settings.
